## What went wrong?

Describe the problem clearly. Include the file path and section if you can.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open `...`
2. Follow step `...`
3. See error / unexpected result

## Expected vs actual

**Expected:**

**Actual:**

## Platform

- [ ] Documentation / repo structure (all platforms)

## Safety concern?

- [ ] Yes — instruction could harm evidence or encourage unsafe action (please explain)

## Additional context

Screenshots, framework version (Minimal / Full Deep Dive), or LLM session notes if relevant.
